violations.text: Milk cooler was observed in poor repair. Per PIC, unit is fluctuating temperatures and unable to hold food adequately. Unit was not in use at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Milk Cooler is observed in poor repair. Unable to hold ambient temperature 41 and under. Establishment has not been using unit. Unit to be repaired/serviced/replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Beans were received at 115 degrees, diced chicken was received at 133. Beans were sent back to mother kitchen to be reheated. Inspector contacted mother kitchen to discuss new procedures to ensure all food gets delivered above 135. Mother kitchen stated hot plate put in Cambro's has not been getting used. In the future, mother kitchen will use hot plate inside of Cambro's to ensure food gets delivered at adequate temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

Milk was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was moved to colder refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
The milk cooler was observed with an ambient temperature of 46 degrees. Unit was taken out of service, work order has been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
Inspector observed leakage from food prep sink. Air gap is not properly aligned with the pipes. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
